clinicalSummary: Randomized controlled pilot trials show that administering dried Carica papaya seeds mixed with honey yields a helminth clearance rate of 71.4% to 76.7% in pediatric stool specimens with zero serious adverse events, confirming strong traditional anthelmintic utility.
citation: Okeniyi JA, et al. (2007). Effectiveness of dried Carica papaya seeds against human intestinal parasitosis: a pilot study. J Med Food.
